meaning: vi.叹息,哭泣vt.抱怨n.哭诉,无聊话,气愤的抱怨
examples: So they pay for all users on Yammer with a corporate email ID.
When I saw that Yammer had won, I thought "I must have been mistaken, it is not plain pasta".
If you are a good corporate citizen Yammer would look a bit career-threatening - for reasons explained below.
Anyone can easily start a Yammer network for free and invite co-workers to join.
Bringing Yammer into the Microsoft family will bring social networking into the enterprise application experience.
